mapper.select: select id, user_id, provider, provider_subject, email_at_provider, display_name_at_provider, avatar_url_at_provider, created_at, updated_at from auth_oauth_accounts where provider = #{provider} and provider_subject = #{providerSubject}
select id, email, email_normalized, display_name, avatar_url, status, created_at, updated_at, last_login_at from auth_users where id = #{userId}
select id, email, email_normalized, display_name, avatar_url, status, created_at, updated_at, last_login_at from auth_users where email_normalized = #{emailNormalized}
mapper.insert: insert into auth_users ( email, email_normalized, display_name, avatar_url, status, created_at, updated_at, last_login_at ) values ( #{email}, #{emailNormalized}, #{displayName}, #{avatarUrl}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{lastLoginAt} )
insert into auth_user_roles (user_id, role, created_at) values (#{userId}, #{role}, #{createdAt}) on conflict (user_id, role) do nothing
mapper.select: select role from auth_user_roles where user_id = #{userId} order by role
mapper.insert: insert into auth_oauth_accounts ( user_id, provider, provider_subject, email_at_provider, display_name_at_provider, avatar_url_at_provider, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{userId}, #{provider}, #{providerSubject}, #{emailAtProvider}, #{displayNameAtProvider}, #{avatarUrlAtProvider}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
